title: OThink-SRR1: Search-Refine-Reason for Multi-Hop Question Answering via Reinforcement Learning

defines.name: OThink-SRR1
defines.definition: A reinforcement-learning-based search-refine-reason framework that iteratively retrieves information, refines it into concise relevant facts, and then reasons over the refined content.

defines.name: GRPO-IR
defines.definition: An end-to-end reinforcement learning algorithm that rewards correct evidence identification and penalizes excessive retrievals to improve search efficiency and focus.

problem: Static and dynamic RAG methods often retrieve irrelevant noise and full documents, which mislead reasoning and increase computation and latency.
